criteria.description: Enrichment service builds successfully from the root Taskfile integration.
criteria.evidence: task enrichment:build -f passed on main after mission merge.
criteria.notes: Build produced enrichment/bin/enrichment; generated artifact was removed after validation.

criteria.description: Service unit tests and race tests pass for validation, callback retry policy, enrichers, and async orchestration.
criteria.evidence: task enrichment:test -f and task enrichment:test:race -f passed on main after mission merge.
criteria.notes: Covers request validation, 202 response, callback behavior, unknown-type skip, ES enricher behavior with fakes, and runner error isolation.

criteria.description: Deployment artifacts document systemd, port 8095, journald logs, restart-on-failure, env templating, and Ansible companion work.
criteria.evidence: Reviewed enrichment/deploy/README.md, enrichment/deploy/enrichment.service, enrichment/deploy/env.example, enrichment/docs/deployment.md, and docs/enrichment-service-deployment.md.
criteria.notes: No real secrets are committed; callback URL and callback API key remain request-local fields.

criteria.description: Changed-service vulnerability check integration includes enrichment.
criteria.evidence: task vuln:changed --dry shows enrichment in GO_SERVICES and would dispatch task vuln:enrichment when detected.
criteria.notes: Resolved the only mission-review drift finding.

negative_invariants.description: Do not modify Waaseyaa as part of this north-cloud mission.
negative_invariants.verification_command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$matches = git diff --name-only d8ecaa0b..HEAD -- | Select-String -Pattern 'waaseyaa' -CaseSensitive:$false; if ($matches) { exit 1 } else { exit 0 }"
